topic: Spec-driven development workflow for breaking down todo.md into small, individual specs
focus_areas: specs folder structure and naming conventions
integration with this repo's workflows/*.js pipeline and todo.md backlog
current_baseline: User currently has Claude Code read todo.md directly and work tasks from it. This works but Claude Code can effectively handle only one big task at a time per session, which causes scope creep and large diffs. User wants to switch to spec-driven development: one small task per spec file in a specs/ folder, so each session has a tightly scoped, reviewable unit of work.

must_include: how it maps onto existing todo.md backlog and workflows/*.js pipeline
must_exclude: unrelated SaaS spec-management tools requiring external accounts
